title: Bizarre mods For Yifei
description:
Bizarre mods gather
I'm going to take some of the stopped packets here and port them
body:
This is a handy recipe pack for the Imaginary Adventure modpack

For example
![Better upgrade template recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ac0ca01dbeec4c1b4eb22bb6e02fef30712c5f.png)
or
![Old version of the Enchanted Golden Apple recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb0f4d63ff65b0caf8ba801d55104ef2cd81dea7.png)
And so on and so forth, and many other convenient formulas
